S.FORM: Mpitu patis hido dehuk ku sapah pyasan ali saya.
S.PHON: mpitu patis ħido deħuk ku sapaħ pjasan ali saja.
S.FORM: Mpitu patis hido dehuk ku sapah pyasan ali saya.
S.PHON: mpitu patis ħido deħuk ku sapaħ pjasan ali saja.
S.TRANSL: 我今天七點到學校。
I arrived at school at seven today.

S.FORM: Prading mpuuyas di, meyah remux sapah ttgsaan ka mptgesa, "Tutuy! Tmhuku!" mesa ka mdudul miyan.
S.PHON: pɾadiŋ mpuujas di, mejaħ ɾemux sapaħ ttgsaan ka mptgesa, "tutuj! tmħuku!" mesa ka mdudul mijan.
S.FORM: Prading mpuuyas di, meyah remux sapah ttgsaan ka mptgesa, "Tutuy! Tmhuku!" mesa ka mdudul miyan.
S.PHON: pɾadiŋ mpuujas di, mejaħ ɾemux sapaħ ttgsaan ka mptgesa, "tutuj! tmħuku!" mesa ka mdudul mijan.
S.TRANSL: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:＂起立!敬禮!＂
It's time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: "Stand up! Salute!"

S.FORM: Paru ba kari nami mesa, "Sndamac su bale mptgesa."
S.PHON: paɾu ba kaɾi nami mesa, "sndamaʦ su bale mptgesa."
S.FORM: Paru ba kari nami mesa, "Sndamac su bale mptgesa."
S.PHON: paɾu ba kaɾi nami mesa, "sndamaʦ su bale mptgesa."
S.TRANSL: 我們大聲的說:＂老師好。＂
We said loudly, "Hi, teacher."

S.FORM: Muuyas miyan de, tgsaan nami na kari ssepu ka mptgesa.
S.PHON: muujas mijan de, tgsaan nami na kaɾi ssepu ka mptgesa.
S.FORM: Muuyas miyan de, tgsaan nami na kari ssepu ka mptgesa.
S.PHON: muujas mijan de, tgsaan nami na kaɾi ssepu ka mptgesa.
S.TRANSL: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
In class, the teacher taught us the Seediq language of numbers.

S.FORM: Smnegul nami mptgesa smepu ma, muuyas nami uyas sspegan.
S.PHON: smnegul nami mptgesa smepu ma, muujas nami ujas sspegan.
S.FORM: Smnegul nami mptgesa smepu ma, muuyas nami uyas sspegan.
S.PHON: smnegul nami mptgesa smepu ma, muujas nami ujas sspegan.
S.TRANSL: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

S.FORM: Eguw bale ka snlhayan mu kari miyan Seediq.
S.PHON: eguw bale ka snlħajan mu kaɾi mijan seediq.
S.FORM: Eguw bale ka snlhayan mu kari miyan Seediq.
S.PHON: eguw bale ka snlħajan mu kaɾi mijan seediq.
S.TRANSL: 我學會好多族語。
I have learned many Seediq languages.

S.FORM: Mosa ku sapah pyasan klaali, smluhe ku kari nami Seediq klaali, saun mu pqbahang bubu mu.
S.PHON: mosa ku sapaħ pjasan klaali, smluħe ku kaɾi nami seediq klaali, saun mu pqbaħaŋ bubu mu.
S.FORM: Mosa ku sapah pyasan klaali, smluhe ku kari nami Seediq klaali, saun mu pqbahang bubu mu.
S.PHON: mosa ku sapaħ pjasan klaali, smluħe ku kaɾi nami seediq klaali, saun mu pqbaħaŋ bubu mu.
S.TRANSL: 我天天上學，我天天在學校學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
I go to school every day, I learn the Seediq language every day, and I want to tell my mother.

S.FORM: Walis Pawan ka ngayan mu yaku.
S.PHON: walis pawan ka ŋajan mu jaku.
S.FORM: Walis Pawan ka ngayan mu yaku.
S.PHON: walis pawan ka ŋajan mu jaku.
S.TRANSL: 我的名字是Walis Pawan。
My name is Walis Pawan.

S.FORM: Pawan Dakis ka ngayan na tama mu.
S.PHON: pawan dakis ka ŋajan na tama mu.
S.FORM: Pawan Dakis ka ngayan na tama mu.
S.PHON: pawan dakis ka ŋajan na tama mu.
S.TRANSL: 我爸爸的名字是Pawan Dakis。
My dad's name is Pawan Dakis.

S.FORM: Robo Walis ka ngayan na bubu mu.
S.PHON: ɾobo walis ka ŋajan na bubu mu.
S.FORM: Robo Walis ka ngayan na bubu mu.
S.PHON: ɾobo walis ka ŋajan na bubu mu.
S.TRANSL: 我媽媽的名字是Robo Walis。
My mother's name is Robo Walis.

S.FORM: Maxal ka knkawas mu saya di.
S.PHON: maxal ka knkawas mu saja di.
S.FORM: Maxal ka knkawas mu saya di.
S.PHON: maxal ka knkawas mu saja di.
S.TRANSL: 我今年10歲。
I am 10 years old.

S.FORM: Niqan ku kingal qbsuran rseno ka yaku, Takun ka ngayan na, maxal kingal ka knkawas na saya di.
S.PHON: niqan ku kiŋal qbsuɾan ɾseno ka jaku, takun ka ŋajan na, maxal kiŋal ka knkawas na saja di.
S.FORM: Niqan ku kingal qbsuran rseno ka yaku, Takun ka ngayan na, maxal kingal ka knkawas na saya di.
S.PHON: niqan ku kiŋal qbsuɾan ɾseno ka jaku, takun ka ŋajan na, maxal kiŋal ka knkawas na saja di.
S.TRANSL: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Takun，他今年11歲。
I have a brother, his name is Takun, he is 11 years old.

S.FORM: Ga miyan suupu muuyas kingal sapah pyasan.
S.PHON: ga mijan suupu muujas kiŋal sapaħ pjasan.
S.FORM: Ga miyan suupu muuyas kingal sapah pyasan.
S.PHON: ga mijan suupu muujas kiŋal sapaħ pjasan.
S.TRANSL: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
We study in the same school.

S.FORM: Smkuxul nami muuyas uyas kana miyan ka qbsuran mu rseno.
S.PHON: smkuxul nami muujas ujas kana mijan ka qbsuɾan mu ɾseno.
S.FORM: Smkuxul nami muuyas uyas kana miyan ka qbsuran mu rseno.
S.PHON: smkuxul nami muujas ujas kana mijan ka qbsuɾan mu ɾseno.
S.TRANSL: 我和哥哥都喜歡唱歌。
Both my brother and I like to sing.

S.FORM: Smkuxul ku lmanguy ka yaku, mgduru de mosa nami lmanguy kana ka tnsapah mu.
S.PHON: smkuxul ku lmaŋuj ka jaku, mgduɾu de mosa nami lmaŋuj kana ka tnsapaħ mu.
S.FORM: Smkuxul ku lmanguy ka yaku, mgduru de mosa nami lmanguy kana ka tnsapah mu.
S.PHON: smkuxul ku lmaŋuj ka jaku, mgduɾu de mosa nami lmaŋuj kana ka tnsapaħ mu.
S.TRANSL: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

S.FORM: Smkuxul ku mgkela dangi bgurah ka yaku, suupu miyan mosa muuyas uyas ma lmanguy.
S.PHON: smkuxul ku mgkela daŋi bguɾaħ ka jaku, suupu mijan mosa muujas ujas ma lmaŋuj.
S.FORM: Smkuxul ku mgkela dangi bgurah ka yaku, suupu miyan mosa muuyas uyas ma lmanguy.
S.PHON: smkuxul ku mgkela daŋi bguɾaħ ka jaku, suupu mijan mosa muujas ujas ma lmaŋuj.
S.TRANSL: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.

S.FORM: Laqi ku Seediq ka yaku.
S.PHON: laqi ku seediq ka jaku.
S.FORM: Laqi ku Seediq ka yaku.
S.PHON: laqi ku seediq ka jaku.
S.TRANSL: 我是賽德克族的小孩。
I am an Seediq child.

S.FORM: Ga Mhebu ka sapah mu yaku.
S.PHON: ga mħebu ka sapaħ mu jaku.
S.FORM: Ga Mhebu ka sapah mu yaku.
S.PHON: ga mħebu ka sapaħ mu jaku.
S.TRANSL: 我們家住在馬赫坡。
Our family lives in Mhebu.

S.FORM: Rima hei kana ka tnsapah miyan.
S.PHON: ɾima ħei kana ka tnsapaħ mijan.
S.FORM: Rima hei kana ka tnsapah miyan.
S.PHON: ɾima ħei kana ka tnsapaħ mijan.
S.TRANSL: 我們家共有五個人。
There are five people in our family.

S.FORM: Teru nami kana mtswai.
S.PHON: teɾu nami kana mtswai.
S.FORM: Teru nami kana mtswai.
S.PHON: teɾu nami kana mtswai.
S.TRANSL: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

S.FORM: Ga ku suupu meniq tama mu, bubu mu, qbsuran mu rseno ma qbsuran mu mqedil.
S.PHON: ga ku suupu meniq tama mu, bubu mu, qbsuɾan mu ɾseno ma qbsuɾan mu mqedil.
S.FORM: Ga ku suupu meniq tama mu, bubu mu, qbsuran mu rseno ma qbsuran mu mqedil.
S.PHON: ga ku suupu meniq tama mu, bubu mu, qbsuɾan mu ɾseno ma qbsuɾan mu mqedil.
S.TRANSL: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

S.FORM: Bbaro hnyegan na ka tama mu, kesacu ka heya.
S.PHON: bbaɾo ħnjegan na ka tama mu, kesaʦu ka ħeja.
S.FORM: Bbaro hnyegan na ka tama mu, kesacu ka heya.
S.PHON: bbaɾo ħnjegan na ka tama mu, kesaʦu ka ħeja.
S.TRANSL: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
My father is tall and he is a policeman.

S.FORM: Rqeling ka bubu mu, ga mgu-ising ka heya.
S.PHON: ɾqeliŋ ka bubu mu, ga mgu-isiŋ ka ħeja.
S.FORM: Rqeling ka bubu mu, ga mgu-ising ka heya.
S.PHON: ɾqeliŋ ka bubu mu, ga mgu-isiŋ ka ħeja.
S.TRANSL: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

S.FORM: Rngagun nami na kari Seediq meniq sapah ka tama mu.
S.PHON: ɾŋagun nami na kaɾi seediq meniq sapaħ ka tama mu.
S.FORM: Rngagun nami na kari Seediq meniq sapah ka tama mu.
S.PHON: ɾŋagun nami na kaɾi seediq meniq sapaħ ka tama mu.
S.TRANSL: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
My father speaks the ethnic language with us at home.

S.FORM: Rbagan ka sngayan laqi muuyas de meyah ku alang klaali.
S.PHON: ɾbagan ka sŋajan laqi muujas de mejaħ ku alaŋ klaali.
S.FORM: Rbagan ka sngayan laqi muuyas de meyah ku alang klaali.
S.PHON: ɾbagan ka sŋajan laqi muujas de mejaħ ku alaŋ klaali.
S.TRANSL: 我們暑假都會回部落。
We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

S.FORM: Suupu nami mosa qmerac qpatun yami ka qbsuran mu rsemo ma, qbsuran mu mqedil.
S.PHON: suupu nami mosa qmeɾaʦ qpatun jami ka qbsuɾan mu ɾsemo ma, qbsuɾan mu mqedil.
S.FORM: Suupu nami mosa qmerac qpatun yami ka qbsuran mu rsemo ma, qbsuran mu mqedil.
S.PHON: suupu nami mosa qmeɾaʦ qpatun jami ka qbsuɾan mu ɾsemo ma, qbsuɾan mu mqedil.
S.TRANSL: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

S.FORM: Kuxul mu riyung ka seediq tnsapah mu.
S.PHON: kuxul mu ɾijuŋ ka seediq tnsapaħ mu.
S.FORM: Kuxul mu riyung ka seediq tnsapah mu.
S.PHON: kuxul mu ɾijuŋ ka seediq tnsapaħ mu.
S.TRANSL: 我很喜歡我們家的人。
I like our family very much.

S.FORM: Maha nami theyaq nganguc yami ka bubu mu ali saya.
S.PHON: maħa nami tħejaq ŋaŋuʦ jami ka bubu mu ali saja.
S.FORM: Maha nami theyaq nganguc yami ka bubu mu ali saya.
S.PHON: maħa nami tħejaq ŋaŋuʦ jami ka bubu mu ali saja.
S.TRANSL: 今天我和媽媽要出去玩。
I went out with my mother today.

S.FORM: Mblawa ka karac diyan, ini ktilux ma ini ksekuy, tleetu ka bgihur.
S.PHON: mblawa ka kaɾaʦ dijan, ini ktilux ma ini ksekuj, tleetu ka bgiħuɾ.
S.FORM: Mblawa ka karac diyan, ini ktilux ma ini ksekuy, tleetu ka bgihur.
S.PHON: mblawa ka kaɾaʦ dijan, ini ktilux ma ini ksekuj, tleetu ka bgiħuɾ.
S.TRANSL: 白天的天空很藍，天氣不冷也不熱，風很涼爽。
The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

S.FORM: Mekan nami ppuqun bobo dupi, so sapo ka ledax hido cmebu hei nami, muuxun bale.
S.PHON: mekan nami ppuqun bobo dupi, so sapo ka ledax ħido ʦmebu ħei nami, muuxun bale.
S.FORM: Mekan nami ppuqun bobo dupi, so sapo ka ledax hido cmebu hei nami, muuxun bale.
S.PHON: mekan nami ppuqun bobo dupi, so sapo ka ledax ħido ʦmebu ħei nami, muuxun bale.
S.TRANSL: 我們在草地上吃著麵包，陽光灑在身上，非常溫暖。
We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.

S.FORM: Bbiyan de mgtanah ka karac di.
S.PHON: bbijan de mgtanaħ ka kaɾaʦ di.
S.FORM: Bbiyan de mgtanah ka karac di.
S.PHON: bbijan de mgtanaħ ka kaɾaʦ di.
S.TRANSL: 下午，天空變紅了。
In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

S.FORM: Smiling ku bubu mu, malux mgtanah ka karac.
S.PHON: smiliŋ ku bubu mu, malux mgtanaħ ka kaɾaʦ.
S.FORM: Smiling ku bubu mu, malux mgtanah ka karac.
S.PHON: smiliŋ ku bubu mu, malux mgtanaħ ka kaɾaʦ.
S.TRANSL: 我問媽媽，為甚麼天空是紅色的。
I asked my mother why the sky is red.

S.FORM: Mesa cmiyuk ka bubu mu, "Yaani psbgihur paru."
S.PHON: mesa ʦmijuk ka bubu mu, "jaani psbgiħuɾ paɾu."
S.FORM: Mesa cmiyuk ka bubu mu, "Yaani psbgihur paru."
S.PHON: mesa ʦmijuk ka bubu mu, "jaani psbgiħuɾ paɾu."
S.TRANSL: 媽媽說:＂可能是颱風要來了。＂
Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

S.FORM: Uka plabu keeman ka karac baro, pkriyak ka pngerah di.
S.PHON: uka plabu keeman ka kaɾaʦ baɾo, pkɾijak ka pŋeɾaħ di.
S.FORM: Uka plabu keeman ka karac baro, pkriyak ka pngerah di.
S.PHON: uka plabu keeman ka kaɾaʦ baɾo, pkɾijak ka pŋeɾaħ di.
S.TRANSL: 晚上天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

S.FORM: Maha nami sapah ka yami duri di.
S.PHON: maħa nami sapaħ ka jami duɾi di.
S.FORM: Maha nami sapah ka yami duri di.
S.PHON: maħa nami sapaħ ka jami duɾi di.
S.TRANSL: 我們也要回家了。
We were going home too.

S.FORM: Moda nami eluw ssaan sapah, drunun mu pngerah ka sntangan mu.
S.PHON: moda nami eluw ssaan sapaħ, dɾunun mu pŋeɾaħ ka sntaŋan mu.
S.FORM: Moda nami eluw ssaan sapah, drunun mu pngerah ka sntangan mu.
S.PHON: moda nami eluw ssaan sapaħ, dɾunun mu pŋeɾaħ ka sntaŋan mu.
S.TRANSL: 在回家的路上，我跟星星許願。
On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

S.FORM: Naka ini eyah ka bgihur paru, mkmosa ku theyaq nganguc dungan.
S.PHON: naka ini ejaħ ka bgiħuɾ paɾu, mkmosa ku tħejaq ŋaŋuʦ duŋan.
S.FORM: Naka ini eyah ka bgihur paru, mkmosa ku theyaq nganguc dungan.
S.PHON: naka ini ejaħ ka bgiħuɾ paɾu, mkmosa ku tħejaq ŋaŋuʦ duŋan.
S.TRANSL: 希望颱風不要來，我還想再出去玩。
I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.

S.FORM: Ga ssiyo sapah mu ka sapah pyasan, mkkesa ku klaali mosa sapah pyasan ma meyah sapah.
S.PHON: ga ssijo sapaħ mu ka sapaħ pjasan, mkkesa ku klaali mosa sapaħ pjasan ma mejaħ sapaħ.
S.FORM: Ga ssiyo sapah mu ka sapah pyasan, mkkesa ku klaali mosa sapah pyasan ma meyah sapah.
S.PHON: ga ssijo sapaħ mu ka sapaħ pjasan, mkkesa ku klaali mosa sapaħ pjasan ma mejaħ sapaħ.
S.TRANSL: 我的學校在我們家旁邊，我天天走路去學校，也走路回家。
My school is next to our house, I walk to school every day, and I also walk home.

S.FORM: Ini kparu ka sapah pyasan nami yami, ini keeguw ka laqi muuyas, mgkela nami kana.
S.PHON: ini kpaɾu ka sapaħ pjasan nami jami, ini keeguw ka laqi muujas, mgkela nami kana.
S.FORM: Ini kparu ka sapah pyasan nami yami, ini keeguw ka laqi muuyas, mgkela nami kana.
S.PHON: ini kpaɾu ka sapaħ pjasan nami jami, ini keeguw ka laqi muujas, mgkela nami kana.
S.TRANSL: 我們學校不大，沒有很多學生，大家互相認識。
Our school is not big, there are not many students, everyone knows each other.

S.FORM: Mosa msseli caw-cang kana ka laqi muuyas, suupu mtheyaq boru ma, suupu mpprengo.
S.PHON: mosa msseli ʦaw-ʦaŋ kana ka laqi muujas, suupu mtħejaq boɾu ma, suupu mppɾeŋo.
S.FORM: Mosa msseli caw-cang kana ka laqi muuyas, suupu mtheyaq boru ma, suupu mpprengo.
S.PHON: mosa msseli ʦaw-ʦaŋ kana ka laqi muujas, suupu mtħejaq boɾu ma, suupu mppɾeŋo.
S.TRANSL: 所有小朋友會聚在操場，一起玩球、一起聊天。
All the children will gather in the playground, play ball and chat together.

S.FORM: Msuupu theyaq yami ka dmptgesa duri, so hari kingal tnsapah paru ka sapah pyasan.
S.PHON: msuupu tħejaq jami ka dmptgesa duɾi, so ħaɾi kiŋal tnsapaħ paɾu ka sapaħ pjasan.
S.FORM: Msuupu theyaq yami ka dmptgesa duri, so hari kingal tnsapah paru ka sapah pyasan.
S.PHON: msuupu tħejaq jami ka dmptgesa duɾi, so ħaɾi kiŋal tnsapaħ paɾu ka sapaħ pjasan.
S.TRANSL: 老師們也會和我們一起玩，學校是個大家庭。
The teachers also play with us, the school is one big family.

S.FORM: Smkesik miyan klaali ka yami, blequn nami bale smkesik ka sapah ttgsaan.
S.PHON: smkesik mijan klaali ka jami, blequn nami bale smkesik ka sapaħ ttgsaan.
S.FORM: Smkesik miyan klaali ka yami, blequn nami bale smkesik ka sapah ttgsaan.
S.PHON: smkesik mijan klaali ka jami, blequn nami bale smkesik ka sapaħ ttgsaan.
S.TRANSL: 我們每天都要打掃，大家要把教室打掃乾淨。
We have to clean every day, and everyone has to clean the classroom.

S.FORM: Mosa smerus bais ka duma ma, mosa smkesi ceka dheran ka duma.
S.PHON: mosa smeɾus bais ka duma ma, mosa smkesi ʦeka dħeɾan ka duma.
S.FORM: Mosa smerus bais ka duma ma, mosa smkesi ceka dheran ka duma.
S.PHON: mosa smeɾus bais ka duma ma, mosa smkesi ʦeka dħeɾan ka duma.
S.TRANSL: 有些人去擦窗戶，有些人去掃地。
Some people clean the windows, some sweep the floor.

S.FORM: Ma, saun nami smkesi kana ssiyo sapah pyasan, mddayo mskingal lnglungan kana ma, uka rtrutiq ka sapah nami pyasan.
S.PHON: ma, saun nami smkesi kana ssijo sapaħ pjasan, mddajo mskiŋal lŋluŋan kana ma, uka ɾtɾutiq ka sapaħ nami pjasan.
S.FORM: Ma, saun nami smkesi kana ssiyo sapah pyasan, mddayo mskingal lnglungan kana ma, uka rtrutiq ka sapah nami pyasan.
S.PHON: ma, saun nami smkesi kana ssijo sapaħ pjasan, mddajo mskiŋal lŋluŋan kana ma, uka ɾtɾutiq ka sapaħ nami pjasan.
S.TRANSL: 我們還會打掃學校的各個角落，大家分工合作，學校每天都很乾淨。
We will also clean every corner of the school. Everyone works together, and the school is very clean every day.

S.FORM: Ciga, mnosa ku qmita tama mu rudan.
S.PHON: ʦiga, mnosa ku qmita tama mu ɾudan.
S.FORM: Ciga, mnosa ku qmita tama mu rudan.
S.PHON: ʦiga, mnosa ku qmita tama mu ɾudan.
S.TRANSL: 昨天，我去部落拜訪爺爺。
Yesterday, I went to visit my grandpa in the tribe.

S.FORM: Bsiyaq miyan ba ini pqqita di, lnglungun mu riyung ka heya.
S.PHON: bsijaq mijan ba ini pqqita di, lŋluŋun mu ɾijuŋ ka ħeja.
S.FORM: Bsiyaq miyan ba ini pqqita di, lnglungun mu riyung ka heya.
S.PHON: bsijaq mijan ba ini pqqita di, lŋluŋun mu ɾijuŋ ka ħeja.
S.TRANSL: 我們很久沒有見面了，我很想念他。
We haven't seen each other for a long time and I miss him a lot.

S.FORM: Qmita ba yaku ka tama mu rudan de, pqdalun ku na sikwa ma, pmahun ku na ocya.
S.PHON: qmita ba jaku ka tama mu ɾudan de, pqdalun ku na sikwa ma, pmaħun ku na oʦja.

S.PHON: qmita ba jaku ka tama mu ɾudan de, pqdalun ku na sikwa ma, pmaħun ku na oʦja.
S.TRANSL: 爺爺一看到我，就請我吃西瓜，請我喝茶。
As soon as grandpa saw me, he invited me to eat watermelon and drink tea.

S.FORM: Cheya bale puqun ka sikwa pnhmaan na tama mu rudan, bale ba malu riyung puqun.
S.PHON: ʦħeja bale puqun ka sikwa pnħmaan na tama mu ɾudan, bale ba malu ɾijuŋ puqun.

S.PHON: ʦħeja bale puqun ka sikwa pnħmaan na tama mu ɾudan, bale ba malu ɾijuŋ puqun.
S.TRANSL: 爺爺種的西瓜很甜，真的很好吃。
The watermelon grown by grandpa is very sweet and really delicious.

S.FORM: Kuxul mu bale ka ocya na tama mu rudan duri, malu ba mahun duri.
S.PHON: kuxul mu bale ka oʦja na tama mu ɾudan duɾi, malu ba maħun duɾi.
S.FORM: Kuxul mu bale ka ocya na tama mu rudan duri, malu ba mahun duri.
S.PHON: kuxul mu bale ka oʦja na tama mu ɾudan duɾi, malu ba maħun duɾi.
S.TRANSL: 我也喜歡爺爺的茶，也很好喝。
I also like grandpa's tea, it's tasted good too.

S.FORM: Ceka na ali de, suupu nami pure ido puqun ceka na ali ka yami bubu mu rudan.
S.PHON: ʦeka na ali de, suupu nami puɾe ido puqun ʦeka na ali ka jami bubu mu ɾudan.
S.FORM: Ceka na ali de, suupu nami pure ido puqun ceka na ali ka yami bubu mu rudan.
S.PHON: ʦeka na ali de, suupu nami puɾe ido puqun ʦeka na ali ka jami bubu mu ɾudan.
S.TRANSL: 中午的時候，我和奶奶一起煮午餐。
At noon, I cooked lunch with my grandma.

S.FORM: Eguw bale hnprayan na bubu mu rudam, niqan qcurux, hei rodux, tmurak ma waso bunga.
S.PHON: eguw bale ħnpɾajan na bubu mu ɾudam, niqan qʦuɾux, ħei ɾodux, tmuɾak ma waso buŋa.

S.PHON: eguw bale ħnpɾajan na bubu mu ɾudam, niqan qʦuɾux, ħei ɾodux, tmuɾak ma waso buŋa.
S.TRANSL: 奶奶煮了很豐盛的午餐，有魚、有雞、有南瓜、還有地瓜葉。
Grandma cooked a big lunch, including fish, chicken, pumpkin, and snails.

S.FORM: Mnekan nami ido ceka na ali de, mosa nami kmetuy sama qnalang.
S.PHON: mnekan nami ido ʦeka na ali de, mosa nami kmetuj sama qnalaŋ.
S.FORM: Mnekan nami ido ceka na ali de, mosa nami kmetuy sama qnalang.
S.PHON: mnekan nami ido ʦeka na ali de, mosa nami kmetuj sama qnalaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 吃完午餐後，我們去菜園摘菜。
After lunch, we went to the vegetable garden to pick vegetables.

S.FORM: Eguw ba bnege na bunga, sari ma qucun ka bubu mu rudan, adis sapah kesun ku na hiya.
S.PHON: eguw ba bnege na buŋa, saɾi ma quʦun ka bubu mu ɾudan, adis sapaħ kesun ku na ħija.

S.PHON: eguw ba bnege na buŋa, saɾi ma quʦun ka bubu mu ɾudan, adis sapaħ kesun ku na ħija.
S.TRANSL: 奶奶拿了很多地瓜、芋頭和蕗蕎給我，要我帶回家。
Grandma brought me a lot of sweet potatoes, taro and buckwheat, and asked me to take them home.

S.FORM: Mnswaye ku dheya de, meeyah ku qmita yamu bobo na dungan kesun mu hiya.
S.PHON: mnswaje ku dħeja de, meejaħ ku qmita jamu bobo na duŋan kesun mu ħija.

S.PHON: mnswaje ku dħeja de, meejaħ ku qmita jamu bobo na duŋan kesun mu ħija.
S.TRANSL: 我跟他們道別，說下次再去看他們。
I said goodbye to them and said I'd see them next time.

S.FORM: Desun miyan na tong-uyen ka mptgesa nami ali saya, mtbeku nami maruy kipu rhengun na.
S.PHON: desun mijan na toŋ-ujen ka mptgesa nami ali saja, mtbeku nami maɾuj kipu ɾħeŋun na.

S.PHON: desun mijan na toŋ-ujen ka mptgesa nami ali saja, mtbeku nami maɾuj kipu ɾħeŋun na.
S.TRANSL: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

S.FORM: Mremux nami tong-uyen de, mesa ka mptgesa, "Berah nii we qbheni so mllamu ma, bukuy na we quyu so mllamu, sai naq rmigo."
S.PHON: mɾemux nami toŋ-ujen de, mesa ka mptgesa, "beɾaħ nii we qbħeni so mllamu ma, bukuj na we quju so mllamu, sai naq ɾmigo."

S.TRANSL: so you can visit them yourself.""
After entering the zoo, the teacher said, There are birds in the front and snakes in the back

S.FORM: Miicu ku quyu ka yaku, kika ini ku osa qmita.

S.TRANSL: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

S.FORM: Eguw ba qbheni qtaan mu, ga skiya skiya bobo qhuni baro ma, ga mu qtaan ka tekung ga mtaqi beling qhuni duri.
S.PHON: eguw ba qbħeni qtaan mu, ga skija skija bobo qħuni baɾo ma, ga mu qtaan ka tekuŋ ga mtaqi beliŋ qħuni duɾi.

S.TRANSL: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

S.FORM: Niqan dapa utux, dmai ma rkelic, uxe mu qntaan kana camac nii, qtaan mu saya de mqaras ku riyung.
S.PHON: niqan dapa utux, dmai ma ɾkeliʦ, uxe mu qntaan kana ʦamaʦ nii, qtaan mu saja de mqaɾas ku ɾijuŋ.
S.FORM: Niqan dapa utux, dmai ma rkelic, uxe mu qntaan kana camac nii, qtaan mu saya de mqaras ku riyung.

S.TRANSL: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

S.FORM: Eguw ba pnssingan mu, saun mu pqita tama bubu mu.
S.PHON: eguw ba pnssiŋan mu, saun mu pqita tama bubu mu.
S.FORM: Eguw ba pnssingan mu, saun mu pqita tama bubu mu.

S.TRANSL: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

S.FORM: Mpsuupu ku tama bubu mu meyah bobo na.
S.PHON: mpsuupu ku tama bubu mu mejaħ bobo na.
S.FORM: Mpsuupu ku tama bubu mu meyah bobo na.
S.PHON: mpsuupu ku tama bubu mu mejaħ bobo na.
S.TRANSL: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
Next time I will come with my parents.

S.FORM: Maha miyan qmita swai tama nami Tay-tong ka ali gdregan nii.
S.PHON: maħa mijan qmita swai tama nami taj-toŋ ka ali gdɾegan nii.
S.FORM: Maha miyan qmita swai tama nami Tay-tong ka ali gdregan nii.
S.PHON: maħa mijan qmita swai tama nami taj-toŋ ka ali gdɾegan nii.
S.TRANSL: 這個假日，我和姊姊去台東拜訪叔叔。
This holiday, my sister and I went to Taitung to visit my uncle.

S.FORM: Taapa nami rulu puniq kndalax Taype mmaha Taytong.
S.PHON: taapa nami ɾulu puniq kndalax tajpe mmaħa tajtoŋ.
S.FORM: Taapa nami rulu puniq kndalax Taype mmaha Taytong.
S.PHON: taapa nami ɾulu puniq kndalax tajpe mmaħa tajtoŋ.
S.TRANSL: 我們從台北搭火車去臺東。
We took the train from Taipei to Taitung.

S.FORM: Dehuk nami Taytong de, mgeriq rulu meyah smterung yami ka swai tama nami.
S.PHON: deħuk nami tajtoŋ de, mgeɾiq ɾulu mejaħ smteɾuŋ jami ka swai tama nami.

S.PHON: deħuk nami tajtoŋ de, mgeɾiq ɾulu mejaħ smteɾuŋ jami ka swai tama nami.
S.TRANSL: 到了台東，叔叔開車來車站接我們。
When we arrived in Taitung, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

S.FORM: Ini ptheya sapah na swai tama nami daka rluwan rulu.
S.PHON: ini ptħeja sapaħ na swai tama nami daka ɾluwan ɾulu.

S.TRANSL: 車站離叔叔家沒有很遠，開車一下子就到了。
The station is not far from my uncle's house, and it's just a short drive away.

S.FORM: Niqan kingal mucang paru ka siyo sapah na swai tama miyan, taapa nami didensya mosa mucang.
S.PHON: niqan kiŋal muʦaŋ paɾu ka sijo sapaħ na swai tama mijan, taapa nami didensja mosa muʦaŋ.

S.TRANSL: 叔叔家附近有個很大的牧場，我們一起騎腳踏車到牧場。
There is a big ranch near my uncle's house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

S.FORM: Dehuk nami mucang de, desun nami na tmabu miric ma, taapa dmai ka sawi tama miyan.
S.PHON: deħuk nami muʦaŋ de, desun nami na tmabu miɾiʦ ma, taapa dmai ka sawi tama mijan.

S.PHON: deħuk nami muʦaŋ de, desun nami na tmabu miɾiʦ ma, taapa dmai ka sawi tama mijan.
S.TRANSL: 在牧場，叔叔帶我們餵羊和騎馬。
In the ranch, my uncle took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

S.FORM: Keeman de, suupu nami mosa mekan ido suci.
S.PHON: keeman de, suupu nami mosa mekan ido suʦi.

S.TRANSL: 晚上，我們一起去市區吃飯。
In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

S.FORM: Suci we eguw riyung rulu, kika taapa nami otobay mosa hiya.
S.PHON: suʦi we eguw ɾijuŋ ɾulu, kika taapa nami otobaj mosa ħija.

S.PHON: suʦi we eguw ɾijuŋ ɾulu, kika taapa nami otobaj mosa ħija.
S.TRANSL: 市區車子很多，所以我們騎摩托車去那裡。
There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

S.FORM: Mmeeyah nami de, wada hiya gguyan ka otobay nami di, uka naq brahan di ma, taapa nami basu meyah di.
S.PHON: mmeejaħ nami de, wada ħija ggujan ka otobaj nami di, uka naq bɾaħan di ma, taapa nami basu mejaħ di.

S.TRANSL: 要離開的時候，發現摩托車被偷了，我們只好搭公車離開。
When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

S.FORM: Nii miyan dehuk Taype ka saya di, ye na ga slayun ka otobay na sawi tama miyan de, ini nami kela duri.
S.PHON: nii mijan deħuk tajpe ka saja di, je na ga slajun ka otobaj na sawi tama mijan de, ini nami kela duɾi.

S.TRANSL: 現在我們回到台北了，不知道叔叔的摩托車找到了沒有。
Now that we are back in Taipei, I don't know if my uncle's motorcycle has been found.

S.FORM: Slaqi ku han we mneniq ku alang Gluban, mmaha ku muuyas sapah pyasan de, mosa ku meniq Taycong di, kika meniq ku naq Taycong hiya di.
S.PHON: slaqi ku ħan we mneniq ku alaŋ gluban, mmaħa ku muujas sapaħ pjasan de, mosa ku meniq tajʦoŋ di, kika meniq ku naq tajʦoŋ ħija di.

S.TRANSL: 小時候我們家住在清流部落，上學以後，就搬到了臺中，一直在都市裡生活。
When we were young, our family lived in Gluban. After I started school, we moved to Taichung and have been living in the city ever since.

S.FORM: muuyas ku ta-se de, mnsluhe ku kingl sslhayan kesun gaya nSeediq, kika klaun mu mesa lmlamu bale ka gaya dSeediq Taywang nii.
S.PHON: muujas ku ta-se de, mnsluħe ku kiŋl sslħajan kesun gaja nseediq, kika klaun mu mesa lmlamu bale ka gaja dseediq tajwaŋ nii.
S.FORM: muuyas ku ta-se de, mnsluhe ku kingl sslhayan kesun gaya nSeediq, kika klaun mu mesa lmlamu bale ka gaya dSeediq Taywang nii.
S.PHON: muujas ku ta-se de, mnsluħe ku kiŋl sslħajan kesun gaja nseediq, kika klaun mu mesa lmlamu bale ka gaja dseediq tajwaŋ nii.
S.TRANSL: 上了大學以後，我修了一堂關於原住民文化的課程，瞭解到臺灣原住民族有各式各樣豐富的文化。
After I went to college, I took a course on aboriginal culture and learned that the aboriginal people in Taiwan have various and rich cultures.

S.FORM: so kiya de, gdregan laqi muuyas rbagan knii, maha miyan qmita ma smiling drudan alang, anu mkmlela nami gaya miyan naq Seediq.
S.PHON: so kija de, gdɾegan laqi muujas ɾbagan knii, maħa mijan qmita ma smiliŋ dɾudan alaŋ, anu mkmlela nami gaja mijan naq seediq.

S.TRANSL: 因此，今年暑假時，我和哥哥回到部落訪問老人家，想要瞭解自己族群的文化。
So this summer, my brother and I went back to our tribe to visit the elderly, hoping to understand the culture of our own ethnic group.

S.FORM: mmsepac kmxalan ka knkawas na rudan mu sapah hii di, ani si so hari knriso ka qtaun dungan.
S.PHON: mmsepaʦ kmxalan ka knkawas na ɾudan mu sapaħ ħii di, ani si so ħaɾi knɾiso ka qtaun duŋan.

S.TRANSL: 老人家已經八十歲了，但是看起來還像中年人。
The old man is already eighty years old, but he still looks like a middle-aged man.

S.FORM: slingun mu mesa mkela su mrengo kari maanu dungan ka heya, mkela riyung mrengo kari miyan Seediq ka heya ma, mkela mrengo kari Tayal, kari Plmukan ma, kari Tanah Tunux duri.

I asked him which languages he knew, and he was fluent in Seediq, as well as Tayal, Hokkien and Japanese.

S.TRANSL: 我問他才知道，原來他小時候就學日本話，太太是泰雅族人，而他工作上認識許多閩南人，所以他會說這麼多語言。
I asked him to find out that he learned Japanese when he was a child, his wife is an Atayal, and he knows many Hokkien at work, so he can speak so many languages.

S.TRANSL: 我的爸爸是部落的獵人。
My dad is a hunter of the tribe.

S.FORM: slaqi ku, wada madis hlmadac ma halung ka tama mu daka swai na ma, wada lmiqu keeman.
S.PHON: slaqi ku, wada madis ħlmadaʦ ma ħaluŋ ka tama mu daka swai na ma, wada lmiqu keeman.

When I was little, my dad and uncle would go out at night with hunting knives and guns.

S.FORM: lmedax de, ga madis nngalan daha meyah sapah.

At daybreak, they returned with their prey.

S.FORM: boyak ncugin ma rapic ncugin, duma naq we niqan ka tkurih duri.
S.PHON: bojak nʦugin ma ɾapiʦ nʦugin, duma naq we niqan ka tkuɾiħ duɾi.

S.PHON: bojak nʦugin ma ɾapiʦ nʦugin, duma naq we niqan ka tkuɾiħ duɾi.

S.TRANSL: 他們會在村口將獵物分好，分享給族人。
They would divide the prey at the entrance of the village and share it with the tribe.

S.FORM: skribu ku tama mu klaali, maha ku smnegul tama mu lmiqu.
S.PHON: skɾibu ku tama mu klaali, maħa ku smnegul tama mu lmiqu.

Every time I quarreled with my father, I wanted to go hunting with my father.

S.FORM: paru su de desun su mu denu mesa ka tama mu.

S.PHON: mkela paħa tleŋa ka ɾseno alaŋ mijan duɾi, mkela paħa duɾaŋ ma qapi btunux.

The men of the tribe also trap their prey, making lasso traps and rock traps.

S.FORM: mkela riyung paha durang ka tama mu, mesa tama mu, drangun tkurih ka nii mesa, asi ta ka blequn qmita ka dapil na, psaun tuqil na ka dudrang mesa hii.
S.PHON: mkela ɾijuŋ paħa duɾaŋ ka tama mu, mesa tama mu, dɾaŋun tkuɾiħ ka nii mesa, asi ta ka blequn qmita ka dapil na, psaun tuqil na ka dudɾaŋ mesa ħii.

S.TRANSL: 我的爸爸很會製作套索陷阱，爸爸說，這是用來捕抓雉雞的，我們要仔細觀察獵物的腳印，陷阱要放在獵物走的路上。

My dad is very good at making lasso traps. Dad said that this is used to catch pheasants. We have to carefully observe the footprints of the prey, and the traps should be placed on the path of the prey.

S.TRANSL: 為了可以趕快和大人一起去打獵，我每天練習製作陷阱，很快地我的陷阱就真的可以抓到獵物了。
In order to go hunting with adults as soon as possible, I practiced making traps every day, and soon my traps can really catch prey.

S.TRANSL: 在2022年，政府召開了原住民身分證可單列族名的會議。
In 2022, the government announced that indigenous identification cards can include tribal names separately.

S.FORM: Smiling ku Umin Kulas bsiyaq mbeyax skadi sehu spatis ngayan Seediq ka patis pnyahan.
S.PHON: smiliŋ ku umin kulas bsijaq mbejax skadi seħu spatis ŋajan seediq ka patis pnjaħan.
S.FORM: Smiling ku Umin Kulas bsiyaq mbeyax skadi sehu spatis ngayan Seediq ka patis pnyahan.
S.PHON: smiliŋ ku umin kulas bsijaq mbejax skadi seħu spatis ŋajan seediq ka patis pnjaħan.
S.TRANSL: 我訪問了長期向政府爭取身分證＂單列族名＂的部落青年Umin Kulas。
I interviewed Umin Kulas, a young tribal member who has long been advocating for the inclusion of tribal names on identification cards.

S.FORM: Mpsterung nami ka ali gdregan nii, maha ku sapah na smiling heya.
S.PHON: mpsteɾuŋ nami ka ali gdɾegan nii, maħa ku sapaħ na smiliŋ ħeja.
S.FORM: Mpsterung nami ka ali gdregan nii, maha ku sapah na smiling heya.

S.TRANSL: 我和他約定好這個假日到他家訪問他。
We had arranged to visit his home this holiday for the interview.

S.FORM: Mpprengo nami ciida, pgklaun kuna pusu ngayan na, desun kuna mgkela tnsapah na ma alang na duri.
S.PHON: mppɾeŋo nami ʦiida, pgklaun kuna pusu ŋajan na, desun kuna mgkela tnsapaħ na ma alaŋ na duɾi.
S.FORM: Mpprengo nami ciida, pgklaun kuna pusu ngayan na, desun kuna mgkela tnsapah na ma alang na duri.

S.TRANSL: 在訪問的過程中，他向我介紹了他的名字的由來，也帶我認識了他的家人、他的部落。
During the interview, he introduced to me the origin of his name and also introduced me to his family and tribe.

S.FORM: Slingun mu, malux su ryuxun ka ngayan, naqah ngayan pntasan su cbeyo peni?
S.PHON: sliŋun mu, malux su ɾjuxun ka ŋajan, naqaħ ŋajan pntasan su ʦbejo peni?
S.FORM: Slingun mu, malux su ryuxun ka ngayan, naqah ngayan pntasan su cbeyo peni?
S.PHON: sliŋun mu, malux su ɾjuxun ka ŋajan, naqaħ ŋajan pntasan su ʦbejo peni?
S.TRANSL: 我問他為什麼堅持要改名，舊的登記方式不好嗎?
I asked him why he insisted on changing his name. Wasn't the old registration method sufficient?

S.FORM: Kesun kuna, spooda matis kari Telu de uka dungus ka ngayan kiya, qnuuqu lmawa ngayan mesa Riso U" ma phlisun daha duri."

S.TRANSL: \" which resulted in many jokes being made."
He told me that using Chinese characters could not accurately convey his name, and others would still call him \Wu Xian Sheng

S.FORM: Mnsuupu ku bubu rudan mosa gnbaruy bbrigan ka ciga, madis egu sama pnhuma na ma sbege nami na snlmeyan ppuqun ta ita Seediq duri.
S.PHON: mnsuupu ku bubu ɾudan mosa gnbaɾuj bbɾigan ka ʦiga, madis egu sama pnħuma na ma sbege nami na snlmejan ppuqun ta ita seediq duɾi.
S.FORM: Mnsuupu ku bubu rudan mosa gnbaruy bbrigan ka ciga, madis egu sama pnhuma na ma sbege nami na snlmeyan ppuqun ta ita Seediq duri.
S.PHON: mnsuupu ku bubu ɾudan mosa gnbaɾuj bbɾigan ka ʦiga, madis egu sama pnħuma na ma sbege nami na snlmejan ppuqun ta ita seediq duɾi.
S.TRANSL: 昨天我跟奶奶去市集擺攤，奶奶帶了許多自己種的蔬菜去，也製作了原住民美食給大家。
Yesterday, I went to the market with my grandmother to set up a stall. My grandmother brought a lot of vegetables that she grew herself and also prepared indigenous cuisine for everyone.

S.FORM: Smkuxul meyah bbrigan na bubu rudan ka seediq, meyah maruy ucik ma ciyak rudu, egu seediq meyah kncheya mekan hnprayan na duri.
S.PHON: smkuxul mejaħ bbɾigan na bubu ɾudan ka seediq, mejaħ maɾuj uʦik ma ʦijak ɾudu, egu seediq mejaħ knʦħeja mekan ħnpɾajan na duɾi.
S.FORM: Smkuxul meyah bbrigan na bubu rudan ka seediq, meyah maruy ucik ma ciyak rudu, egu seediq meyah kncheya mekan hnprayan na duri.
S.PHON: smkuxul mejaħ bbɾigan na bubu ɾudan ka seediq, mejaħ maɾuj uʦik ma ʦijak ɾudu, egu seediq mejaħ knʦħeja mekan ħnpɾajan na duɾi.
S.TRANSL: 大家很喜歡奶奶的攤位，辣椒和絲瓜很多人買，許多人來品嘗她煮的菜餚。
Everyone loved my grandmother's stall. Many people bought the chilis and African eggplants, and many people came to taste the dishes she cooked.

S.FORM: Malu riyung puqun hnprayan na sama bale ma ido dhequy ka heya, pnsrubu hmangac hei boyak ma mao, smkenux kncheya na ka seediq, kika meyah msseli mtbeku bbrigan hini.
S.PHON: malu ɾijuŋ puqun ħnpɾajan na sama bale ma ido dħequj ka ħeja, pnsɾubu ħmaŋaʦ ħei bojak ma mao, smkenux knʦħeja na ka seediq, kika mejaħ msseli mtbeku bbɾigan ħini.
S.FORM: Malu riyung puqun hnprayan na sama bale ma ido dhequy ka heya, pnsrubu hmangac hei boyak ma mao, smkenux kncheya na ka seediq, kika meyah msseli mtbeku bbrigan hini.
S.PHON: malu ɾijuŋ puqun ħnpɾajan na sama bale ma ido dħequj ka ħeja, pnsɾubu ħmaŋaʦ ħei bojak ma mao, smkenux knʦħeja na ka seediq, kika mejaħ msseli mtbeku bbɾigan ħini.
S.TRANSL: 她煮的山萵苣和糯米飯非常好吃，還有用山豬肉煮的馬告滷肉，味道吸引了很多客人，大家都來我們攤位排隊。
The Lactucin and sticky rice she cooked were delicious, as well as the braised pork with maqaw pepper and wild boar meat. The flavors attracted many customers, and everyone lined up at our stall.

S.TRANSL: 我們的東西很快就賣完了，奶奶說：＂都是因為有你的幫忙。＂
Our goods sold out quickly, and my grandmother said, \It's all thanks to your help.\""

S.FORM: Ooda nii ge, snluhe ku knklaan qqhuni ma ppuqun na Seediq, slluhe bbale oda gnbaruy duri.
S.PHON: ooda nii ge, snluħe ku knklaan qqħuni ma ppuqun na seediq, slluħe bbale oda gnbaɾuj duɾi.
S.FORM: Ooda nii ge, snluhe ku knklaan qqhuni ma ppuqun na Seediq, slluhe bbale oda gnbaruy duri.

S.TRANSL: 這個活動，我學到了有關原住民植物和食品的知識，並且體驗到了擺攤的辛苦。
Through this event, I learned about indigenous plants and food and experienced the hard work of running a stall.

S.FORM: Qmita ku snkuxul riyung ppuqun ncbeyo ka bubu rudan, malu bale ma sqaras mu ka ndaan na nii duri.
S.PHON: qmita ku snkuxul ɾijuŋ ppuqun nʦbejo ka bubu ɾudan, malu bale ma sqaɾas mu ka ndaan na nii duɾi.
S.FORM: Qmita ku snkuxul riyung ppuqun ncbeyo ka bubu rudan, malu bale ma sqaras mu ka ndaan na nii duri.
S.PHON: qmita ku snkuxul ɾijuŋ ppuqun nʦbejo ka bubu ɾudan, malu bale ma sqaɾas mu ka ndaan na nii duɾi.
S.TRANSL: 看到了奶奶對傳統食物的熱愛，我感到非常驕傲和榮幸。
Seeing my grandmother's passion for traditional food, I feel very proud and honored.
